history.en: Developed in late 19th century Germany from the now-extinct German Bullenbeisser (used for hunting large game like boar and bear) and English Bulldog, originally for bull-baiting and hunting, later refined for working and companion roles
history.zh: 19世纪末期德国培育而成，源自现已灭绝的德国大丹犬（用于猎杀野猪和熊等大型猎物）与英国斗牛犬，最初用于斗牛和狩猎，后改良为工作犬和伴侣犬。

overview.en: The Boxer is a medium-to-large, muscular breed known for its playful, energetic, and loyal temperament. They are intelligent, friendly, and alert, making them excellent family companions and watchdogs. Boxers are highly social and thrive on human interaction, often forming strong bonds with their owners. Despite their working dog heritage, they have a silly, clownish side that endears them to families. Their short coat and expressive face give them a distinctive appearance. Boxers are generally good with children and other pets when properly socialized, but they can be stubborn and require consistent training. They are energetic dogs that need plenty of exercise to prevent boredom and destructive behavior. Overall, the Boxer is a loving and protective breed that brings joy and energy to any home.
overview.zh: 拳师犬是一种中型到大型、肌肉发达的犬种，以其活泼、精力充沛和忠诚的气质而闻名。它们聪明、友善且警觉，是优秀的家庭伴侣和看门犬。拳师犬非常社会化，喜欢与人互动，通常与主人建立牢固的联系。尽管有工作犬的血统，它们也有傻乎乎、滑稽的一面，深受家庭喜爱。它们短毛和富有表情的脸庞使其外观独特。拳师犬通常对孩子和其他宠物友好，前提是经过适当的社会化训练，但它们可能固执，需要持续的训练。它们是精力充沛的狗，需要大量运动以防止无聊和破坏性行为。总的来说，拳师犬是一种充满爱心和保护欲的犬种，为任何家庭带来欢乐和活力。

care.en: Daily care for a Boxer includes moderate grooming due to their short coat; weekly brushing with a rubber curry brush or hound glove helps remove loose hair and keep the coat shiny. They shed moderately year-round and more heavily during seasonal changes. Bathing is only needed occasionally, using a mild dog shampoo. Regular ear cleaning, nail trimming, and dental hygiene are essential. Boxers are highly energetic and require at least 60 minutes of vigorous exercise daily, such as brisk walks, jogging, or play sessions in a secure area. They thrive on interactive activities like fetch or agility. Veterinary visits should be annual for check-ups and vaccinations; Boxers are prone to certain health issues like hip dysplasia, heart conditions (e.g., aortic stenosis), and cancer, so regular health screenings are important. They are sensitive to extreme temperatures, especially heat, so exercise should be limited in hot weather.
care.zh: 拳师犬的日常护理包括适度的梳理：由于被毛短，每周用橡胶梳或猎犬手套梳理一次，有助于去除死毛并保持毛发光泽。它们全年适度掉毛，换季时更严重。仅需偶尔用温和的犬用香波洗澡。定期清洁耳朵、修剪指甲和牙齿卫生是必需的。拳师犬精力充沛，每天需要至少60分钟的剧烈运动，如快走、慢跑或在安全区域玩耍。它们喜欢互动活动，如接球或敏捷训练。兽医检查应每年一次，包括体检和疫苗接种；拳师犬易患某些健康问题，如髋关节发育不良、心脏疾病（如主动脉瓣狭窄）和癌症，因此定期健康筛查很重要。它们对极端温度敏感，尤其是高温，炎热天气时应限制运动。

training.en: Training a Boxer requires patience, consistency, and positive reinforcement methods. They are intelligent but can be stubborn, so early socialization and obedience training are crucial. Start training as a puppy, using treats, praise, and play as rewards. Boxers respond well to firm yet gentle guidance; harsh corrections can lead to resistance. Focus on basic commands like sit, stay, come, and heel. Due to their high energy, incorporate training into play to keep them engaged. Crate training can help with housebreaking and provide a safe space. Boxers are eager to please and excel in activities like agility, obedience, and therapy work. They can be protective, so ensure they are well-socialized to people and other animals from a young age. Consistency is key; all family members should use the same commands and rules. Training sessions should be short (10-15 minutes) to maintain focus.
training.zh: 训练拳师犬需要耐心、一致性和正强化方法。它们聪明但可能固执，因此早期社会化和服从训练至关重要。从幼犬开始训练，使用零食、表扬和玩耍作为奖励。拳师犬对坚定而温和的指导反应良好；严厉的纠正可能导致反抗。专注于基本命令，如坐下、等待、过来和跟随。由于精力旺盛，将训练融入游戏以保持它们的参与度。笼内训练有助于家庭训练并提供安全空间。拳师犬渴望取悦，在敏捷、服从和治疗工作中表现出色。它们可能具有保护性，因此确保从小与人和动物进行良好社会化。一致性是关键；所有家庭成员应使用相同的命令和规则。训练时间应短（10-15分钟）以保持专注。

diet.en: Feed a Boxer a high-quality, balanced diet appropriate for their age, size, and activity level. Puppies require food formulated for growth, while adults need maintenance diets. Boxers are prone to bloat (gastric dilatation-volvulus), so feed two or three smaller meals per day instead of one large meal, and avoid vigorous exercise immediately after eating. Choose a diet with high-quality protein sources (e.g., chicken, beef, fish) and healthy fats. Include carbohydrates for energy, but avoid excessive fillers. Fresh water should always be available. Treats should be limited to 10% of daily calories. Monitor weight to prevent obesity, which can exacerbate joint issues. Some Boxers have food allergies or sensitivities; consult a vet if you notice skin or digestive issues. Supplements like glucosamine and chondroitin may benefit joint health, especially in older dogs. Always consult your veterinarian for specific dietary recommendations.
diet.zh: 为拳师犬提供适合其年龄、体型和活动水平的高质量均衡饮食。幼犬需要促进生长的配方食品，而成犬需要维持性饮食。拳师犬易患胃胀气（胃扩张-扭转），因此每天喂食两到三次小餐，而不是一顿大餐，并避免餐后立即剧烈运动。选择含有高质量蛋白质来源（如鸡肉、牛肉、鱼）和健康脂肪的饮食。包括碳水化合物以提供能量，但避免过量填充物。应始终提供新鲜水。零食应限制在每日热量的10%以内。监测体重以防止肥胖，肥胖会加剧关节问题。有些拳师犬有食物过敏或敏感症；如果发现皮肤或消化问题，请咨询兽医。补充剂如葡萄糖胺和软骨素可能有益于关节健康，尤其是老年犬。始终咨询您的兽医以获取具体的饮食建议。

livingTips.en: Boxers are adaptable but do best in homes with a securely fenced yard where they can run and play. They are not well-suited for apartment living unless their exercise needs are fully met, as they are active indoors and can be destructive if bored. They thrive on human companionship and should not be left alone for long periods; they may develop separation anxiety. Boxers are generally excellent with children, being patient and playful, but supervision is recommended with very young children due to their size and energy. They can get along with other dogs and pets if properly socialized from puppyhood. Their short coat makes them sensitive to cold, so provide a warm bed and limit outdoor time in cold weather. In hot climates, provide shade, water, and avoid exercise during peak heat. Boxers are alert watchdogs and will bark to announce visitors, but they are not aggressive without reason.
livingTips.zh: 拳师犬适应性强，但最适合有安全围栏院子的家庭，以便它们奔跑和玩耍。它们不太适合公寓生活，除非运动需求完全得到满足，因为它们在室内活跃，如果无聊可能会破坏性。它们需要人类陪伴，不应长时间独处；可能产生分离焦虑。拳师犬通常对孩子非常好，耐心且爱玩，但由于体型和精力，建议在非常年幼的孩子旁边监督。如果从小适当社会化，它们可以与其他狗和宠物相处。它们的短毛使它们对寒冷敏感，因此提供温暖的床铺并限制寒冷天气的户外时间。在炎热气候中，提供阴凉、水，并避免在高温时段运动。拳师犬是警觉的看门犬，会吠叫通知访客，但不会无理由攻击。
